title: AEP v1.2 Lite Packet Schema
description: v1.2 immune-system primitive (operator source.md L84-93). The brutally simple civilian schema. 4 files verbatim from L88-91: claim.json + sources/ + receipt.json + proof-card.json. Operator framing: 'The general population does not need the full engine. They need the receipt.' Advanced AEP packets compile DOWN to AEP Lite. Lineage NOVEL packaging; EXTENDS PROV simple-graph + C2PA minimal-manifest patterns. Composes_with: v1.2 F22 CivilianProofCard (proof-card.json shape) + v1.1 F18 SourceProvenanceGraph (single-source honest framing).

claim_json_path.description: Operator L88 verbatim. Single claim.json at packet root.

sources_dir_path.description: Operator L89 verbatim. Sources directory at packet root.

receipt_json_path.description: Operator L90 verbatim. Single receipt.json at packet root.

proof_card_json_path.description: Operator L91 verbatim. Single proof-card.json at packet root.

claim_json_required_fields.description: Minimal fields required in claim.json for AEP Lite. Pro-form attestations and quorum records are dropped on compile-down.

file_naming_pattern.description: One file per source. Original source attached directly; no separate metadata JSON.

receipt_json_required_fields.description: Minimal receipt fields. Civilian-readable. 'checked_by_runtimes_count' per operator L75 'Checked by 3 runtimes' civilian vocabulary.

bound_to_schema_id.description: F22 schema is the source of truth for proof-card.json shape.

5_rows_required.description: Operator L60-66 verbatim. All 5 rows MUST be present in a Lite packet.

allowed.description: Operator L93: 'advanced AEP can compile down to AEP Lite.'

lossless_for_civilian_decision.description: Plan SC1 + RB-2 acceptance: compile-down must not lose information material to civilian decision. Falsified by Phase 9 stop-condition test.

what_is_lost.description: Honest disclosure per sec73.6. Examples: 'DAG amendment history', 'rater quorum attestations', 'Ed25519 signatures', 'reproducibility certificate'.

minimum_file_count.description: claim.json + receipt.json + proof-card.json + at least one file in sources/.

maximum_file_count.description: Operator L86 'brutally simple.' Practical cap to prevent Pro-shape creep.

external_precedents.description: F18 lineage. AEP Lite EXTENDS: PROV simple-graph + C2PA minimal-manifest packaging conventions.

what_is_lost: Reviewer principal IDs (replaced with role names)
Mutation suite per-mutation reports (replaced with summary counts)

lineage_basis.verifying_grep: rg 'prov simple graph|c2pa minimal manifest' --type md research/sources/
